Alias.name: Test Sentry Info
Alias.script: print("================================") print("SENTRY CRASH REPORTING TEST") print("================================") print("Sentry should be initialized and running") print("") print("Available test commands:") print(" sentry info - Show this info") print(" sentry test - Send a test message to Sentry") print(" sentry bread - Add a breadcrumb") print(" sentry crash1 - Test null pointer crash (WILL CRASH!)") print(" sentry crash2 - Test division by zero (WILL CRASH!)") print(" sentry crash3 - Test stack overflow (WILL CRASH!)") print("") print("WARNING: crash commands will terminate Mudlet!") print("================================")

Alias.name: Test Sentry Message
Alias.script: print("Sending test message to Sentry...") -- This would need C++ integration to actually send to Sentry -- For now we simulate it print("TEST: Would send message: 'Mudlet Sentry test message from " .. os.date() .. "'") print("In a real implementation, this would call SentryHandler::captureMessage()")

Alias.name: Add Breadcrumb
Alias.script: local breadcrumb = "User action at " .. os.date() print("Adding breadcrumb: " .. breadcrumb) -- This would call SentryHandler::addBreadcrumb() in C++ print("TEST: Breadcrumb added (would be sent with next crash)")

Alias.name: Crash Test 1
Alias.script: print("================================") print("WARNING: CRASH TEST 1 - NULL POINTER") print("This WILL crash Mudlet in 3 seconds!") print("================================") tempTimer(3, function() -- Force a crash by calling a nil function -- This will generate an error that should be caught by Sentry local x = nil x() end)

Alias.name: Crash Test 2
Alias.script: print("================================") print("WARNING: CRASH TEST 2 - LUA ERROR") print("This will trigger a Lua error in 3 seconds!") print("================================") tempTimer(3, function() error("SENTRY TEST: Intentional Lua error for crash reporting test") end)

Alias.name: Crash Test 3
Alias.script: print("================================") print("WARNING: CRASH TEST 3 - STACK OVERFLOW") print("This WILL crash Mudlet in 3 seconds!") print("================================") tempTimer(3, function() -- Infinite recursion to cause stack overflow local function overflow() overflow() end overflow() end)

Script.name: Sentry UI Setup
